scripts.start:test: make .stamps/rockpool-workspace-container && VITE_IDE_URL=http://localhost:9081 VITE_PREVIEW_URL=http://localhost:9082 npm run build -w packages/client && ENV_FILE=test.env ELASTICMQ_CONF=elasticmq.test.conf podman compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml up -d
scripts.stop:test: ENV_FILE=test.env ELASTICMQ_CONF=elasticmq.test.conf podman compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml down
scripts.logs:test: ENV_FILE=test.env ELASTICMQ_CONF=elasticmq.test.conf podman compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml logs -f
scripts.test:e2e:headless: ENV_FILE=test.env ELASTICMQ_CONF=elasticmq.test.conf node --env-file=test.env node_modules/.bin/playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts
